config.title: Settings
config.subtitle: Platform options (current location)
config.main_subtitle: Centralized management of the clinic and communication channels.
config.language_help: The selected language will apply to the entire interface (menus, titles, buttons).

config.other_integrations_hint: Manage API keys for OpenAI, databases and other services.
config.media_hint: Manage chat multimedia storage. Deleted files cannot be recovered.
config.cleanup_hint: Delete old photos, videos and audios.
config.smart_storage_hint: The system uses direct Chatwoot/YCloud URLs whenever possible. Only manually uploaded or backup-downloaded files take up local space.
config.confirm_clean_media: Are you sure you want to delete media files older than {{days}} days? This action is irreversible.

approvals.no_staff_register: Register professionals or secretaries to see them here.
approvals.error_load_users: Could not load users. Make sure you have CEO permissions.

approvals.consultation_price_help: Consultation price for this professional. If not set, the clinic's default price is used.

clinics.title: Clinics
clinics.subtitle: Manage clinics and their configuration (calendar, WhatsApp).
clinics.bot_phone_help: Must match the number YCloud sends to the webhook.
clinics.calendar_help: Local: internal calendar only. Google: sync with Google Calendar.
clinics.working_hours_help: Set the days and hours the clinic is open. The AI agent will use these hours.
clinics.faq_answer_placeholder: e.g. No, we offer private care...
clinics.faq_empty: No FAQs configured. Add the first one.
clinics.consultation_price_help: The AI agent will use this value when the patient asks about pricing. Leave empty to not disclose price.
clinics.day_location_help: If empty, the clinic's default address will be used.
clinics.bank_help: Bank account details for deposits and payments. The AI agent will share them when appropriate and verify receipts.
clinics.derivation_email_help: Email where handoff notifications will be sent when the AI needs human intervention.

login_extra.demo_ready: Demo account ready. One click and you're in.

legal.center_subtitle: Transparency and security in how we handle your data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: {appName} collects information necessary for dental clinic management, including patient names, scheduling histories and contact details. When you connect your Meta Ads account, we collect performance statistics (clicks, spend, impressions) to calculate your ROI.
privacy.s2_intro: Data obtained through Meta APIs is used exclusively to:
privacy.s2_item1: Display your campaign performance in our dashboard.
privacy.s2_item2: Attribute incoming WhatsApp messages to specific Meta ads.
privacy.s2_item3: Generate return on investment (ROI) reports for the clinic owner.
privacy.s3_body: We use AES-256 encryption to protect all access tokens and sensitive credentials. We never share your data with third parties without your explicit consent.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using {appName}, you agree to the following terms:
terms.s1_body: {appName} is a platform for administrative management of clinics. The user is responsible for the accuracy of the data entered and compliance with local health regulations.
terms.s2_body: Integration with Meta Ads and WhatsApp depends on the terms and conditions of Meta Platforms, Inc. We are not responsible for service interruptions caused by external platforms.
terms.s3_body: You can revoke access to your data at any time through the Meta settings panel or within our platform in the Marketing section.

chat_extra.no_messages_yet: No messages yet in this conversation
chat_extra.messages_appear_here: New messages will appear here automatically.
chat_extra.contact_not_patient: This contact is not yet a registered patient.

landing.headline: Agenda, patients and AI in a single app
landing.subheadline: Try the platform with one click. No credit card. Immediate access to the demo.
landing.cta_disclaimer: We automatically log you in the background directly to the demo account (without exposing passwords in screenshots)
landing.feature_agenda: Agenda by clinic and professional. Syncs with Google calendars.
landing.feature_ai: Telephone AI agent (WhatsApp) that answers, schedules, triages and hands off to human.
landing.feature_analytics: Analytics for CEOs and analytics for professionals.

leads.page_subtitle: Management of prospects received from Meta Ads campaigns
leads.title: Lead Forms (Meta)
leads.subtitle: Management of Leads coming from Meta advertising forms.
leads.info_detail: Leads are automatically downloaded upon receiving the Webhook.
leads.webhook_description: Configure this URL in Meta to send leads automatically using Leads Bridge.
leads.webhook_url_instructions: Paste this exact URL into Meta Leads Webhooks settings.
leads.verify_token_instructions: Paste this token into your Meta Developer dashboard.
leads.step_3: Assign CRM (Webhook) and grant corresponding permissions.
leads.step_4: In Meta for Developers, configure Webhooks for Leadgen.
leads.step_5: Paste the URL and Token and subscribe to 'leadgen'.
leads.view_leads_description: Review all prospects entered via ads.
leads.automatic_attribution_description: Our technology links WhatsApp sales and revenue with Leads coming from Meta.
leads.search_placeholder: Search by name, phone or email...
leads.no_leads_description: You haven't received any leads from Meta Ads forms yet
leads.reason_placeholder: Ex: Called the lead, interested in implants...
leads.conversion_warning_description: This action will permanently link this lead with an existing patient in the system. Meta Ads attribution will be transferred to the patient.
leads.patient_id_help: Enter the existing patient's ID in the system
